name: cc-edge-claude-code
author: VisiCore Tech - CriblPacks@VisiCoreTech.com
description: Cribl Edge Pack that collects Claude Code session logs, history, stats, plans, tasks, teams, plugins, and OTEL telemetry from the local filesystem and OTLP gRPC, then forwards them to a Cribl Stream worker group for indexing, analysis, and search. Each data source gets a unique datatype metadata value for downstream sourcetype mapping.
